message:
fix: make doctor checks backend-agnostic for Dolt support

- Remove unnecessary Dolt skip guards from CheckStaleClosedIssues and
  CheckStaleMolecules which already use the backend-agnostic factory
- Replace hardcoded SQLite driver in fix/sync.go countDatabaseIssues()
  with factory-based counting via GetStatistics()
- Add backend detection to DetectPendingMigrations to skip SQLite-specific
  migration checks (hash-ids, version mismatch) for Dolt backends
- Close false positive bd-piva8 (error messages were already in
  SQLite-specific code paths)

Fixes: bd-2movb, bd-lftxx, bd-k1noz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
